name: Pecan Chicken Breast with Mustard Sauce
recipeIngredient: 2 Chicken breasts, split and lightly pounded
recipeInstructions:
1. Dip the chicken breasts in a mixture of 4 tablespoons butter and mustard.
2. Press pecans into the chicken breasts.
3. Heat the remaining butter and peanut oil in a pan over medium heat.
4. Sauté the chicken breasts until browned and firm, then remove to a warm platter.
5. Deglaze the pan with sour cream and mustard, season with salt and pepper.
6. Pour the sauce over the chicken.
NOTE: To deglaze, pour the liquid into the hot pan and stir briskly until any browned bits clinging to the bottom and sides of the pan have been incorporated into the liquid.
